141 def test_and_register_ssh(host: str, port: int = 22, username: str = "root",
142                            password: str = "", pkey=None, timeout: int = 10) -> dict:
143     """测试连接并自动注册主机指纹.
144 
145     专用于添加新资产时的连接测试。
146     返回 {"ok": True/False, "message": "...", "fingerprint": "..."}
147 
148     流程：
149     1. 使用 AutoAddPolicy 连接（首次信任）
150     2. 连接成功后保存指纹到 known_hosts
151     3. 后续操作使用 RejectPolicy + 已录入的指纹
152     """
153     from io import StringIO
154 
155     # 先测试端口可达
156     import socket
157     try:
158         sock = socket.create_connection((host, port), timeout=timeout)
159         sock.close()
160     except Exception as e:
161         return {"ok": False, "message": f"端口 {port} 无法连接: {e}"}
162 
163     # 使用宽松策略连接
164     client = register_host(host, port)
165     kwargs = dict(hostname=host, port=port, username=username, timeout=timeout,
166                   banner_timeout=timeout)
167     if pkey:
168         kwargs["pkey"] = pkey
169     elif password:
170         kwargs["password"] = password
171     else:
172         kwargs["look_for_keys"] = False
173         kwargs["allow_agent"] = False
174 
175     try:
176         client.connect(**kwargs)
177     except paramiko.AuthenticationException:
178         return {"ok": False, "message": "认证失败，用户名或密码错误"}
179     except paramiko.SSHException as e:
180         return {"ok": False, "message": f"SSH错误: {e}"}
181     except Exception as e:
182         return {"ok": False, "message": f"连接异常: {e}"}
183 
184     # 获取指纹
185     fingerprint = ""
186     host_keys = client.get_host_keys()
187     lookup_key = f"[{host}]:{port}" if port != 22 else host
188     if lookup_key in host_keys:
189         for key_type, key in host_keys[lookup_key].items():
190             fingerprint = f"{key_type} {key.get_fingerprint().hex()[:32]}..."
191             break
192 
193     # 保存指纹
194     save_host_key(client, host, port)
195 
196     # 执行测试命令
197     try:
198         stdin, stdout, stderr = client.exec_command("echo ok", timeout=5)
199         result = stdout.read().decode().strip()
200         client.close()
201         if result == "ok":
202             return {"ok": True, "message": f"连接成功，指纹已录入", "fingerprint": fingerprint}
203         else:
204             return {"ok": False, "message": "命令执行异常"}
205     except Exception as e:
206         client.close()
207         return {"ok": False, "message": f"命令执行失败: {e}"}
